name: Endless Chat as Memory
description: Treating a long chat as the durable source-of-truth.
manifestation: Critical decisions and corrections lived in the thread until exported.
risk: Hidden context debt and failed portation.
prevention: Externalize accepted knowledge into artifacts, registers and status files.

name: Beautiful Synthesis as Validation
description: Confusing a coherent synthesis with evidence.
manifestation: Powerful formulas felt true before field testing.
prevention: Always mark validation type and uncertainty.

name: Architecture as Delay
description: Continuing to architect instead of testing assumptions.
manifestation: Rapid production of high-level documents before field evidence.
prevention: Further architecture requires explicit gap justification.

name: Execution as Escape
description: Jumping into channels or launch mechanics to avoid unresolved conceptual ambiguity.
manifestation: Detailed channel packs appeared before all phase boundaries were normalized.
prevention: Tag execution elements as candidates until validated.

name: Document Proliferation
description: Creating new documents faster than they can be governed.
manifestation: Many valuable ZIPs required later normalization.
prevention: Choose update/register/park before creating new document.

name: Premature Canonization
description: Turning attractive ideas into canon before evidence.
prevention: Canon update requires review and status decision.

name: Channel-Driven Thinking
description: Letting publication channels shape core architecture.
manifestation: LinkedIn/site/Telegram/Pinterest/YouTube became highly detailed before being reclassified.
prevention: Keep channels as execution candidates; abstract only projection/use/feedback.

name: Model Confidence Drift
description: Model sounds confident while layer alignment drifts.
manifestation: Execution artifact was produced confidently under Phase 4 before correction.
risk: Wrong artifact accepted due to fluency.
prevention: Require scope check and uncertainty marking.

name: Hidden Context Debt
description: Assuming future agents will infer context not explicitly packaged.
manifestation: Need for boot packs, mentor prompt and handoff emerged during portation.
risk: New Project starts from zero or misreads state.
prevention: Maintain boot sources and status summaries.
